title: aristella keniensis
intro: Aristella keniensis, also known as the Kenya aristella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory agent and antioxidant, which can help in reducing swelling and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Aristella keniensis include its potential to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can be used in tea or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
